drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T0(f2 <= "alpha", $b0_0_0 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(false, $b0_0_0));
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f1 in ("a", "", "a"), f0 == 100, $b1_0_0 : f1)
then
    insert(new T1(true, $p1_0.getF0()));
    insert(new T1(false, -4));
end
rule "R2"
salience -7
when
    T0(f0 == 7)
    T1(f1 >= 0, f1 > -1000000007)
then
end
rule "R3"
when
    T1(f0 != false, f1 != -4, $b3_0_0 : f0)
    T0(f1 > "b", $b3_1_0 : f0, $b3_1_1 : f1)
    accumulate( T0(f0 < $b3_1_0, $s3_2 : f0); $a3_2 : max($s3_2) )
then
end
rule "R4"
salience 6
when
    T0($b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1(true, $b4_0_1));
    insert(new T1(true, $b4_0_1));
end
query Q0(long $qa0_0, boolean $qa0_1)
    $qp0_0 : T1(f1 == $qa0_0, f0 == $qa0_1, f1 >= 100, f1 != 3, $qb0_0 : f1, $qb0_1 : f1)
end

query Q1(String $qa1_0)
    $qp1_0 : T0(f2 == $qa1_0, f2 != "zz", f0 != -1000000007, $qb1_0 : f1)
    $qp1_1 : T1($qb1_1 : f1, $qb1_2 : f1)
end

query TCr(String $a, String $b)
    ( RelR(src == $a, dst == $b) )
    or
    ( RelR($m, $b;) and TCr($a, $m;) )
end

rule QR0 salience -7
when
    ?Q0(-2, true;)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, 9, 1.5, "zz", false));
end

rule QR1
when
    T0($qr1_b0 : f1)
    ?Q1($qr1_x0;)
    ?TCr($qr1_x0, "beta";)
then
    insert(new QOut(2, 4, 2.5, $qr1_x0, true));
end

rule QR2
when
    T1()
    T1(f0 != true)
    ?Q0(-5, $qr2_x0;)
    ?TCr("b", "beta";)
    T1(f0 == $qr2_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(3, -3, 3.5, "a", true));
end

rule QRtwin salience 2
when
    T0($qr1_b0 : f1)
    ?Q1($qr1_x0;)
    ?TCr($qr1_x0, "beta";)
then
    insert(new QOut(4, 0, 0.0, "t", false));
